extra.reason: Implemented X API-primary ingestion with optional xui fallback, tests, and documentation updates.
Implemented factor registry/storage foundation with point-in-time observations, tests, and thermo review fixes

Implemented curated macro factor catalog and FRED/BLS/BEA/Treasury/Fed providers with idempotent PIT refresh semantics; thermo review fixed deterministic availability timestamps, validation-before-write, and latest-date selection

Implemented EIA and Census semiconductor supply-chain factor catalog and providers with configured API-key support, provider rate limiting, monthly PIT availability, missing/revised observation handling, tests, and thermo review cleanup

Implemented factor regime classification and point-in-time factor joins for ranking, API explanation payloads, and backtest replay; thermo review fixed typed boundaries, parallel PIT context lookup, and dependency wiring

Addressed thermo review findings: safe fetched-at PIT availability, post-rank factor enrichment, batched regime joins, derived theme relevance tags, and factors refresh CLI entrypoint with regression tests
Addressed factor datasource code-quality review findings
Addressed second factor datasource code-quality review findings
Implemented factor datasource review fixes
Addressed PR review feedback and verified factor datasource branch
Extended security master with SEC CIK, issuer-name, former-name, and identifier-lineage support

Implemented cache-first SEC submissions and Company Facts ingestion with fair-access policy, idempotent structured payload cache, retry handling, accession lineage, bulk archive URLs, tests, and README coverage

Implemented point-in-time SEC filing delta events preserving accession/fact/unit/period/filed/fetched lineage, restatement/amendment handling, missing-period gap metadata, unit-isolated comparisons, gross-margin compression, persistence, tests, and README coverage.

Published SEC filing-delta events into filing payloads with stable reason codes, added SEC fact lineage evidence for narrative and structural outputs, exposed point-in-time SEC delta replay for backtests, updated README source coverage, and verified with thermo review, full tests, lint, mypy, and app factory launch.
Implemented generic RSS/Atom FeedAdapter with conditional GETs, recency/cap/dedupe controls, full-text fallback, failure isolation, service wiring, README coverage, and verification.

Seeded 18 curated RSS/Atom feeds across first-party company/IR, company technical, semiconductor trade press, and technology press; added static and live feed validation with CLI; updated README source coverage; thermo review found no structural blockers; verified live feeds, full tests, lint, format, mypy, and app factory launch.

Moved RSS feed selection into the sources service path: active platform=rss rows now map to FeedAdapter Feed configs, default seeding materializes the curated static catalog as RSS source rows, manual ingestion passes DB-backed RSS feeds into IngestionService, and Sources API create/list/deactivate behavior covers RSS metadata. Verified with thermo review, live feed validation, focused tests, full pytest, lint, format, mypy, diff check, and app factory launch.
Completed RSS source health API/UI, metrics, persistence, docs, and focused tests.
Completed Nasdaq Trader symbol-directory ingestion
Completed SEC ownership event parser, persistence, migration, tests, README coverage, and verification.
Completed FINRA short-volume and SEC fails-to-deliver ingestion, persistence, CLI, README coverage, thermo review fixes, and verification.
Completed market-plumbing alert/read-model guardrails and point-in-time replay wiring
Completed innovation alias mapping with confidence, review metadata, and false-positive guardrails
Completed USPTO PatentsView/ODP patent ingestion, staleness guards, family dedupe, and security/theme-linked patent signals
Completed OpenAlex/arXiv research ingestion, pagination/rate-limit guards, DOI/arXiv dedupe, and security/theme-linked research signals
Completed structural and narrative publication support for conservative patent/research innovation evidence

Built claim retrieval substrate: src/retrieval/ (text/schemas/config/repository/service), migration 045 (embedding vector(384)+HNSW on evidence_claims), claim_retrieval_enabled flag, CLI claim-retrieval index|search. Semantic search over structured claims via MiniLM+pgvector cosine; retrieve() returns top-K RetrievedClaim with confidence/lane/lineage + lane/theme/subject/confidence filters. 26 new tests, full suite 3845 passed.

Built theme briefing generator: src/briefing/ (prompt grounding-gate, template fallback, generator, schemas, config). GET /themes/{id}/briefing returns grounded clauses each citing claim_ids; parse_briefing_response enforces no-uncited-assertion by intersecting cited ids with retrieved set; templated fallback under breaker-open/no-key. LLM wiring reuses scoring GenericCircuitBreaker+ScoringConfig (mirrors semantic_judge). theme_briefing_enabled flag, DI via get_briefing_service. 29 new tests, full suite 3878 passed.

Built cited Q&A: src/qa/ (prompt grounding-gate, service with sufficiency gate, schemas, config). POST /qa answers a free-text question with claim_id-cited segments; grounding-sufficiency gate returns confidence=insufficient (refusal) when no claims or top similarity < min_grounding_score; LLM-synthesized=high, templated fallback=low. parse_qa_response enforces no-uncited-assertion. cited_qa_enabled flag, gate-before-service DI, registered in app.py. 18 new tests, full suite 3897 passed.

Fixed all 13 tsc -b build errors: removed 4 unused imports (cn/Tag/t/latency), tightened EntitySentimentResponse.trend to the union the panel requires, deleted duplicate Security type in favor of canonical SecurityItem, dropped redundant pre-spread ticker/exchange keys (TS2783), and corrected ForceGraph2D ref + nodeCanvasObject typings. npm run build now exits 0.

Frontend briefing view + citation linking. Enriched GET /themes/{id}/briefing with per-claim citations lineage (citation_from_claim: triple + source_type/source_id/span). Frontend: useThemeBriefing hook, BriefingPanel (ThemeDetail 'Briefing' tab) renders clauses with inline [n] citation markers; document-sourced citations deep-link to /documents/{source_id} (jump to evidence/source). generatedByBadge formatter. Backend 30 briefing tests pass; npm run build exits 0, eslint clean. Q&A answer UI deferred to follow-up.

Extraction eval harness + golden set. src/eval/: pure evaluate(golden_docs, extractor) scores recall/precision/f1 by normalized (subject,predicate,object) triple match; rule_extractor adapts extract_claims_from_document. 6-doc hand-labelled golden set (golden/extraction_golden.json) with implicit claims the regex misses → current rule extractor recall 0.70/precision 1.00, leaving headroom for the LLM pass. CI gate (tests/test_eval/test_golden_eval.py: recall>=0.6, precision>=0.9 floors). CLI: news-tracker eval extraction. Same harness gates 7th.2 unchanged. 22 new tests, full suite 3912 passed.

Extracted shared JsonLLMClient (src/scoring/json_llm.py) + parse_cited_entries gate (src/retrieval/citation_gate.py); semantic_judge/briefing/qa all consume them, ~164 fewer lines, full suite green (3927)

ReviewResolutionService.resolve transitions a review task and re-runs reconcile_claim for approved held (claim_review/low_confidence) tasks, releasing them into assertions; other resolutions/task types don't reconcile (was_held_for_review gate). Also restores 7th.x CLAUDE.md docs dropped by the PR #23 merge. +7 tests, suite green (3934)

AttributionService.attribute_theme ranks docs by exact additive decomposition of the theme's weighted net sentiment (sentiment_contribution sums to bullish-bearish; volume to 1), reusing the aggregator's document_weight. Pure attribute_documents + shared document_sentiments_from_rows mapper. Surfaced at GET /themes/{id}/attribution. +14 tests, suite green (3945)

SentimentPropagation now returns per-node ordered causal path (PropagationHop: from/to/relation/edge_confidence), built incrementally during BFS (path=source.path+[hop]); len(path)==depth. Surfaced via POST /graph/propagate (PropagationImpactItem.path). +6 tests, suite green (3950)
